title: rubus corymbosus var. armatus
intro: Rubus corymbosus var. armatus is a variant of the thorny blackberry bush, known for its sharp, thorny stems and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus corymbosus var. armatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, and its fruits are also eaten fresh or used in baked goods and jams.
